cases.label: Manifest regression
cases.model: kft_q1 ~ kft_n1

cases.label: Latent regression
cases.model:
KFT_Q =~ kft_q1 + kft_q3
KFT_N =~ kft_n1 + kft_n3
KFT_Q ~ KFT_N

cases.label: Latent regression with free loadings
cases.model:
KFT_Q =~ NA*kft_q1 + kft_q3
KFT_N =~ NA*kft_n1 + kft_n3
KFT_Q ~~ 1*KFT_Q
KFT_N ~~ 1*KFT_N
KFT_Q ~ KFT_N

cases.label: One-factor CFA
cases.model: KFT =~ kft_v1 + kft_v3 + kft_q1 + kft_q3 + kft_n1 + kft_n3

cases.label: Three-factor CFA
cases.model:
KFT_V =~ kft_v1 + kft_v3
KFT_Q =~ kft_q1 + kft_q3
KFT_N =~ kft_n1 + kft_n3

cases.label: Second-order CFA
cases.model:
KFT_V =~ kft_v1 + kft_v3
KFT_Q =~ kft_q1 + kft_q3
KFT_N =~ kft_n1 + kft_n3
KFT_G =~ KFT_V + KFT_Q + KFT_N

cases.label: Manifest path analysis
cases.model:
FH ~ SICK
SHP ~ SICK + FH

cases.label: Non-saturated manifest path analysis
cases.model:
FH ~ SICK
SHP ~ FH

cases.label: Latent path analysis
cases.model:
SH =~ SHP + SHC
PH =~ SICK + CONSULT
FH =~ FH1 + FH2
FH ~ PH
SH ~ PH + FH

cases.label: Latent state model
cases.model:
state1 =~ d11 + d21
state2 =~ d12 + d22
state3 =~ d13 + d23

cases.label: Latent state model with correlated residuals
Latent state model with indicator-specific factor
cases.model:
state1 =~ d11 + d21
state2 =~ d12 + d22
state3 =~ d13 + d23
is2 =~ d21 + d22 + d23
is2 ~~ 0*state1
is2 ~~ 0*state2
is2 ~~ 0*state3

cases.label: Latent state weak invariance
cases.model:
state1 =~ d11 + eq1*d21
state2 =~ d12 + eq1*d22
state3 =~ d13 + eq1*d23
is2 =~ d21 + 1*d22 + 1*d23
is2 ~~ 0*state1
is2 ~~ 0*state2
is2 ~~ 0*state3

cases.label: Latent state strong invariance
cases.model:
state1 =~ d11 + eq1*d21
state2 =~ d12 + eq1*d22
state3 =~ d13 + eq1*d23
is2 =~ d21 + 1*d22 + 1*d23
is2 ~~ 0*state1
is2 ~~ 0*state2
is2 ~~ 0*state3
d11 ~ 0*1
d12 ~ 0*1
d13 ~ 0*1
state1 ~ 1
state2 ~ 1
state3 ~ 1
d21 ~ eq2*1
d22 ~ eq2*1
d23 ~ eq2*1

state3 =~ d13 + eq1*d23

is2 ~~ 0*state2
is2 ~~ 0*state3

d12 ~ 0*1
d13 ~ 0*1
state1 ~ eqmean*1
state2 ~ eqmean*1
state3 ~ eqmean*1

d22 ~ eq2*1
d23 ~ eq2*1

state3 =~ d13 + eq1*d23

cases.label: Latent state-trait model
cases.model:
state1 =~ depdad11 + depdad21
state2 =~ depdad12 + depdad22
state3 =~ depdad13 + depdad23
trait =~ state1 + state2 + state3
is2 =~ depdad21 + depdad22 + depdad23
is2 ~~ 0*state1
is2 ~~ 0*state2
is2 ~~ 0*state3
is2 ~~ 0*trait
depdad11 ~ 0*1
depdad12 ~ 0*1
depdad13 ~ 0*1
state1 ~ 0*1
trait ~ 1
state2 ~ 1
state3 ~ 1

cases.label: Latent autoregressive cross-lagged model
cases.model:
depr1 =~ d11 + d21
depr2 =~ d12 + d22
depr3 =~ d13 + d23
comp1 =~ c11 + c21
comp2 =~ c12 + c22
comp3 =~ c13 + c23
depr2 ~ depr1 + comp1
depr3 ~ depr2 + comp2
comp2 ~ comp1 + depr1
comp3 ~ comp2 + depr2
depr3 ~~ 0*comp3

cases.label: Extended latent autoregressive cross-lagged model
cases.model:
depr1 =~ d11 + d21
depr2 =~ d12 + d22
depr3 =~ d13 + d23
isd =~ d21 + d22 + d23
isd ~~ 0*depr1
isd ~~ 0*depr2
isd ~~ 0*depr3
isd ~~ comp1
isd ~~ comp2
isd ~~ comp3
comp1 =~ c11 + c21
comp2 =~ c12 + c22
comp3 =~ c13 + c23
isc =~ c21 + c22 + c23
isc ~~ 0*comp1
isc ~~ 0*comp2
isc ~~ 0*comp3
isc ~~ depr1
isc ~~ depr2
isc ~~ depr3
depr2 ~ depr1 + comp1
depr3 ~ depr2 + depr1 + comp2
comp2 ~ comp1 + depr1
comp3 ~ comp2 + comp1 + depr2
depr2 ~~ comp2
depr3 ~~ comp3

d23 ~ eq2*1

isd ~~ comp3

comp3 =~ c13 + eq3*c23

c23 ~ eq4*1
comp1 ~ 1
comp2 ~ 1
comp3 ~ 1

isc ~~ depr1

cases.label: First-order intercept-only latent growth curve
cases.model:
interc =~ 1*a1 + 1*a2 + 1*a3 + 1*a4
linear =~ 0*a1 + 1*a2 + 2*a3 + 3*a4
linear ~~ 0*linear
linear ~ 0*1
interc ~~ 0*linear

cases.label: Second-order linear latent growth curve
cases.model:
anx1 =~ a11 + eq1*a21
anx2 =~ a12 + eq1*a22
anx3 =~ a13 + eq1*a23
anx4 =~ a14 + eq1*a24
a11 ~ 0*1
a12 ~ 0*1
a13 ~ 0*1
a14 ~ 0*1
a21 ~ eq2*1
a22 ~ eq2*1
a23 ~ eq2*1
a24 ~ eq2*1
interc =~ 1*anx1 + 1*anx2 + 1*anx3 + 1*anx4
linear =~ 0*anx1 + 1*anx2 + 2*anx3 + 3*anx4
interc ~ 1
linear ~ 1
is2 =~ a21 + 1*a22 + 1*a23 + 1*a24
is2 ~~ 0*anx1
is2 ~~ 0*anx2
is2 ~~ 0*anx3
is2 ~~ 0*anx4
is2 ~~ 0*interc
is2 ~~ 0*linear
